reviews.review_description: Hi why want it let me download

I really can't believe how much I enjoy this game. 

Seriously.

reviews.review_title: I havent played but for a 3 star game
reviews.review_description: it looks good considering it has 3 stars but new it might need some changes or bug fixes but over all it looks good
Fun and challenge. Better than I expected.

reviews.review_title: I love it, it is unique!
reviews.review_description: Simple, unique, addictive. These are my three words that can say it all..

You get one star for that one dollar I had to spend on this lousy game. It did make me scream when I got hit by a car. It’s basically the old game frogger, but it needs more streets so we’ll have a different setting and more things to do like upgrades, or gather more things other than coins.

reviews.review_title: not standing while crossing the street?
reviews.review_description:
cool..fun & entertaining game VR. 
but I think the character we play is like not in standing position, too short, if we see the ground is too close, it's like we're crawling, not standing..
also, if possible add more vehicle like motorcycle, etc.
thanks.
